diagrams.title: Three Types of Java Comments
diagrams.description: Shows the syntax and structure of single-line, multi-line, and documentation comments
elements: Example code snippets for each type
diagrams.purpose: Learn to identify and use different comment types in Java

diagrams.title: Javadoc Comment Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates the structure of a Javadoc comment with standard tags
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to write proper documentation comments for API generation

diagrams.title: Javadoc Tool Processing Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how Javadoc tool converts source code with documentation comments into HTML documentation
diagrams.purpose: Understand the Javadoc documentation generation process
